title: Nintendo direct 應該九月先,8月28日又係流料

replies.msg:
https://www.nintendolife.com/news/2020/08/september_issue_of_nintendo_dream_to_reveal_switch_game_everyone_will_enjoy

Japanese video game magazine Nintendo Dream will reportedly reveal a Switch game
"that everyone will enjoy" in its upcoming September issue.
This information was teased in its latest edition this month.
